features.name: register without reset holding constant value
features.description: Code should include a register declared without reset signal that is initialized to a constant value and never updated except at initialization

features.name: chain of resetless registers with constant propagation
features.description: Code should include two or more registers without reset connected in a chain where the first register holds a constant and subsequent registers copy from the previous one

features.name: output assigned from resetless register chain
features.description: Code should include a combinational output that is assigned from the last register in a resetless register chain carrying a constant value
